heading: Treatment of amendments to antidumping and countervailing duty law
label: 4588 Treatment of amendments to antidumping and countervailing duty law
notes: References in TextThe Tariff Act of 1930, referred to in par. (1), is , . Title VII of the Act is classified generally to subtitle IV (§ 1671 et seq.) of chapter 4 of this title. Section 303 of the Act was classified to and was repealed, effective , by , , . For savings provisions and treatment of references to section 1303 in other laws, see section 261(b), (d)(1)(C) of , set out as notes under former .
